description: Create comprehensive documentation for the Zapier automation workflow, including recommended Zap configurations for welcome emails, lead scoring/tagging, CRM sync, and re-engagement sequences. This documentation provides the creative workflow strategy that makes the integration actionable.
steps: Create docs/ZAPIER_WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md with the following sections: (1) Overview explaining the architecture (forms -> API route -> Zapier webhook -> automations). (2) Setup Instructions: how to create a Zapier Catch Hook, get the webhook URL, set it as ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL env var in Vercel. (3) Webhook Payload Schema: document the exact JSON shape sent to Zapier with field descriptions. (4) Recommended Zap #1 - Welcome Email Drip: Trigger: Catch Hook. Filter by lead_segment. Action: send personalized welcome email via Gmail/Mailchimp/SendGrid based on segment. For calculator_power_user: send detailed report follow-up. For content_reader: send weekly digest intro. For newsletter_subscriber: send welcome + top 5 articles. For exit_intent_capture: send the promised Financial Planning Toolkit PDF. (5) Recommended Zap #2 - Lead Scoring and Tagging: Trigger: Catch Hook. Use Zapier Filter to route by lead_score ranges (80-100: hot lead, 50-79: warm lead, 0-49: nurture). Action: Add to Google Sheets or CRM with appropriate tags. High-score leads get instant Slack notification to sales. (6) Recommended Zap #3 - CRM Sync (HubSpot/Apollo): Trigger: Catch Hook. Action: Create/update contact in CRM. Map form_source to contact source field, lead_score to lead rating, page_url to first touch URL, utm_params to attribution fields. (7) Recommended Zap #4 - Re-engagement for Calculator Users: Trigger: Catch Hook filtered where lead_segment = calculator_power_user. Action: Wait 3 days (Delay step), then send follow-up email with 'Did you know you can also try our [related calculator]?' Include link back to site. (8) Recommended Zap #5 - Engagement Sequence: Multi-step Zap using Paths. Path A (lead_score >= 70): immediate personal outreach email. Path B (lead_score 40-69): add to 5-email nurture sequence. Path C (lead_score < 40): add to monthly newsletter only. (9) Free Tier Optimization Tips: How to maximize Zapier's free tier (5 Zaps, 100 tasks/month). Suggest combining Zaps using Paths/Filters. Recommend which 2-3 Zaps to prioritize if on free tier. (10) Testing section: how to test with curl, what to look for in Zapier task history.
Update the project README.md or create a brief mention at the end linking to the Zapier workflow guide.
Update LEAD_CAPTURE_FIELD_IDS.md Integration Notes section to reference the new /api/lead-capture endpoint and the Zapier integration, replacing the 'no backend endpoint yet' note.
acceptance_criteria: docs/ZAPIER_WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md exists with all 5 recommended Zap configurations documented
The guide includes the webhook payload schema with all fields documented
The guide includes free tier optimization tips
The guide includes testing instructions with curl examples
LEAD_CAPTURE_FIELD_IDS.md is updated to reference the new API endpoint
verification: Run pnpm build and confirm no errors (docs don't affect build but ensures no accidental breakage)
Verify docs/ZAPIER_WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md is comprehensive and well-structured
